hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');try{const briefingIdx='.briefing/INDEX.md';if(!fs.existsSync(briefingIdx)){process.exit(0)}const counterFile='.briefing/.work-counter';let counter=0;if(fs.existsSync(counterFile)){counter=parseInt(fs.readFileSync(counterFile,'utf8').trim(),10)||0}counter++;fs.writeFileSync(counterFile,String(counter));const today=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);let todayCount=0;for(const sub of['decisions','learnings']){const d='.briefing/'+sub;if(fs.existsSync(d)){todayCount+=fs.readdirSync(d).filter(f=>{try{return fs.statSync(d+'/'+f).mtime.toISOString().slice(0,10)===today}catch(e){return false}}).length}}const prevFile='.briefing/.prev-entry-count';let prev=0;if(fs.existsSync(prevFile)){prev=parseInt(fs.readFileSync(prevFile,'utf8').trim(),10)||0}if(todayCount>prev){fs.writeFileSync(counterFile,'0');fs.writeFileSync(prevFile,String(todayCount));process.exit(0)}fs.writeFileSync(prevFile,String(todayCount));if(counter>=10&&todayCount===0){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'[BriefingVault] BLOCKED: '+counter+' file edits this session, 0 decisions/learnings written to .briefing/. Write at least one entry to .briefing/decisions/ or .briefing/learnings/ NOW to continue.'})+'\n')}else if(counter>=3&&todayCount===0){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{additionalContext:'[BriefingVault] REQUIRED: You have made '+counter+' file edits this session and written no decisions/learnings to .briefing/. Write at least one decision or learning NOW before continuing.'}})+'\n')}process.exit(0)}catch(e){process.exit(0)}"
hooks.description: BriefingVault enforcer: warns at 3 edits, blocks at 10 edits if no decisions/learnings written today
BriefingVault: auto-collect web search/fetch URLs to references/auto-links.md
Persona vault: throttled mid-session update (every 5 user messages)

hooks.command:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');try{if(!fs.existsSync('.briefing/INDEX.md')){process.exit(0)}const mcFile='.briefing/.session-message-count';let mc=0;if(fs.existsSync(mcFile)){mc=parseInt(fs.readFileSync(mcFile,'utf8').trim(),10)||0}mc++;fs.writeFileSync(mcFile,String(mc));if(mc<3){process.exit(0)}const today=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);const wcFile='.briefing/.work-counter';let wc=0;if(fs.existsSync(wcFile)){wc=parseInt(fs.readFileSync(wcFile,'utf8').trim(),10)||0}let hasAgent=false;try{const lp='.briefing/agents/agent-log.jsonl';if(fs.existsSync(lp)){hasAgent=fs.statSync(lp).mtime.toISOString().slice(0,10)===today}}catch(e){}if(wc===0&&!hasAgent){process.exit(0)}let sessionCount=0;const sd='.briefing/sessions';if(fs.existsSync(sd)){sessionCount=fs.readdirSync(sd).filter(f=>{if(f.indexOf('-auto')!==-1)return false;try{return fs.statSync(sd+'/'+f).mtime.toISOString().slice(0,10)===today}catch(e){return false}}).length}let dlCount=0;for(const sub of['decisions','learnings']){const d='.briefing/'+sub;if(fs.existsSync(d)){dlCount+=fs.readdirSync(d).filter(f=>{if(f.indexOf('-auto')!==-1)return false;try{return fs.statSync(d+'/'+f).mtime.toISOString().slice(0,10)===today}catch(e){return false}}).length}}const total=sessionCount+dlCount;if(total>0&&sessionCount>0){process.exit(0)}if(total>0&&sessionCount===0){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{additionalContext:'[BriefingVault] You have written '+dlCount+' decisions/learnings but no session summary yet. Write .briefing/sessions/'+today+'-<topic>.md to document this conversation.'}})+'
');process.exit(0)}if(mc>=6){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'[BriefingVault] '+mc+' messages exchanged, '+wc+' file edits, but 0 vault entries written today. Write a session summary, decision, or learning to .briefing/ NOW before continuing.'})+'
')}else{process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{additionalContext:'[BriefingVault] REQUIRED: '+mc+' messages exchanged this session with '+wc+' file edits. Write at least one entry to .briefing/sessions/, .briefing/decisions/, or .briefing/learnings/ NOW. Template: ---
date: '+today+'
type: session
tags: [relevant]
---
# Session: <topic>

## Summary
(what was discussed/decided/learned)'}})+'
')}process.exit(0)}catch(e){process.exit(0)}"
hooks.description: BriefingVault enforcer: warns at 3 messages, blocks at 6 messages if no vault entries written today; sessions/ checked separately
Persona vault: auto-update profile.md, suggestions.jsonl, agents summary (writes files only, no stdout)
BriefingVault: enforce meaningful session summary before session end (blocks if >= 3 edits and no summary)
